about:
Kentucky school calendars are approved locally by each public school district, so first day of school, fall break, winter break, spring break, professional development days, election days, and make-up day schedules can vary from one community to another. Most Kentucky districts begin classes in August and finish the school year in late May or early June, but exact dates should always be checked against the official district calendar.

Kentucky families often need more than a simple list of holidays. District calendars may include staff-only professional development days, opening and closing staff days, possible weather make-up days, extended learning days, and district-specific notes about school hours. These details affect childcare, transportation, athletics, appointments, and family travel plans.

Weather and emergency schedule changes are an important part of Kentucky school planning. Districts may use Non-Traditional Instruction (NTI) days, delayed openings, early dismissals, or make-up days depending on local conditions and district policy. This page organizes Kentucky district calendar links in one place and points families back to official school sources for final verification.
planningTips: Check professional development and staff-only days before arranging childcare, because students usually do not attend on those dates.
Review possible make-up days and NTI policies before booking travel during winter or early spring.
Kentucky districts may not share the same fall break or spring break week. Verify the exact district calendar if siblings attend different systems.
Use official district announcements for weather closures, delayed openings, early dismissals, and emergency calendar changes.

districtClusters.label: Western Kentucky District Calendars
districtClusters.description: Western Kentucky districts may include local make-up day notes, professional development days, and school-hour details in their academic calendars.

districts.label: Henderson County Schools Calendar
districts.note: Henderson County Schools calendar dates for Henderson, Kentucky, including fall break, winter break, spring break, professional development days, and PDF download options.

faqs.q: When do Kentucky schools start in 2026?
faqs.a: Most Kentucky public school districts begin the 2026-2027 school year in August. Exact first day dates vary by district, so families should select a district calendar below and verify the official source before making plans.

faqs.q: When is winter break for Kentucky schools?
faqs.a: Winter break in Kentucky usually falls from late December into early January, but the exact start and return dates are set by each district. Use the district calendar links on this page to find the official winter break window.

faqs.q: Do Kentucky schools have fall break?
faqs.a: Many Kentucky districts schedule a fall break, often in October, but it is not identical statewide. District calendars should be checked individually for fall break dates and any staff-only days around the break.

faqs.q: When does spring break start in Kentucky schools?
faqs.a: Kentucky spring break commonly falls in March or April, but there is no single statewide spring break week. Select a district calendar on this page to confirm the official spring break dates for that school system.

faqs.q: How many school days are required in Kentucky?
faqs.a: Kentucky school calendars must meet state instructional-time requirements, but districts publish their own approved calendars with local schedules, make-up days, and NTI policies. Families should verify official attendance-day totals with the district calendar.

faqs.q: What are NTI days in Kentucky school calendars?
faqs.a: NTI stands for Non-Traditional Instruction. Some Kentucky districts may use NTI days during weather closures or emergency schedule changes so learning can continue without a traditional in-person school day.

faqs.q: Where can I find Kentucky school calendar PDFs?
faqs.a: Each Kentucky district page on MySchoolDates links to available official district calendar sources and PDF downloads when published. Start with the district list below, then use the district's official calendar as the source of record.

faqs.q: Are Kentucky school calendars the same for every district?
faqs.a: No. Kentucky school calendars are approved locally by district boards, so first day, last day, breaks, professional development days, and make-up days can differ across districts.

faqs.q: Do Kentucky schools close for Election Day?
faqs.a: Some Kentucky districts list Election Day as a no-school day or staff day, while others may follow a different schedule. Families should check their specific district calendar.

faqs.q: Can I add a Kentucky school calendar to Google Calendar?
faqs.a: Yes. District pages on MySchoolDates include calendar download options when available, including ICS files that can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook.
